success.title: Success
success.description: Whether registration completed (true also when the email already resolved to an existing Person Account).

wasAlreadyRegistered.title: Was already registered
wasAlreadyRegistered.description: True when the email resolved to an existing chart; no new record was created. Planner should continue straight to Book Appointment.

patientDisplayName.title: Patient display name
patientDisplayName.description: Human-readable patient name for the confirmation reply. Never an Id.

registeredEmail.title: Registered email
registeredEmail.description: Plain email string used for the patient record, safe to echo back to the user.

message.title: Message
message.description: Confirmation or error text safe to show the patient.
